destinations.name: Kuala Lumpur
destinations.description: A leading Muslim-friendly destination known for its halal food scene, mosques, and family-friendly attractions.

destinations.name: Istanbul
destinations.description: A historic city bridging two continents, rich in Islamic heritage and halal dining options.

destinations.name: Dubai
destinations.description: A modern Muslim-friendly hub offering luxury travel experiences with extensive halal dining and prayer facilities.

destinations.name: Singapore
destinations.description: A vibrant city-state with strong halal certification standards and diverse Muslim-friendly amenities.

destinations.name: Jakarta
destinations.description: The capital of the world's largest Muslim-majority country, offering abundant halal food and prayer spaces.

destinations.name: London
destinations.description: A growing Muslim-friendly destination in Europe with a wide range of halal dining and mosques.

destinations.name: Cape Town
destinations.description: A scenic coastal city with an established Muslim community and increasing halal travel offerings.

destinations.name: Tokyo
destinations.description: An emerging Muslim-friendly destination investing in halal certification and prayer room infrastructure.

destinations.name: Doha
destinations.description: A modern Gulf capital blending traditional Islamic culture with world-class museums and skyline views.

destinations.name: Abu Dhabi
destinations.description: Home to the Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, offering a mix of heritage sites and modern halal-friendly attractions.

destinations.name: Mecca
destinations.description: The holiest city in Islam and the destination of the annual Hajj pilgrimage.

destinations.name: Medina
destinations.description: The second-holiest city in Islam, home to the Prophet's Mosque and rich Islamic heritage.

destinations.name: Amman
destinations.description: A city rich in ancient history, serving as a gateway to Petra and other Muslim-friendly heritage sites.

destinations.name: Cairo
destinations.description: Home to iconic Islamic architecture, historic mosques, and the ancient pyramids of Giza.

destinations.name: Marrakech
destinations.description: A vibrant North African city known for its markets, palaces, and deep-rooted Islamic heritage.

destinations.name: Casablanca
destinations.description: Morocco's largest city, home to the Hassan II Mosque and a growing halal culinary scene.

destinations.name: Zanzibar City
destinations.description: An island destination with a majority-Muslim population, pristine beaches, and Swahili-Islamic culture.

destinations.name: Penang
destinations.description: A UNESCO heritage city famous for its halal street food and multicultural charm.

destinations.name: Bandung
destinations.description: A cool-climate city known for its halal culinary scene, fashion outlets, and nearby volcanic scenery.

destinations.name: Brunei (Bandar Seri Begawan)
destinations.description: A small, affluent sultanate with strict halal standards and striking mosque architecture.

destinations.name: Colombo
destinations.description: A coastal capital with a well-established Muslim community and increasing halal dining options.

destinations.name: Male
destinations.description: The gateway to the Maldives' overwater resorts, with halal cuisine widely available.

destinations.name: Baku
destinations.description: A Caspian Sea capital blending modern architecture with Islamic and Soviet-era history.

destinations.name: Sarajevo
destinations.description: A European city with deep Ottoman-Islamic roots, historic mosques, and halal cuisine.

destinations.name: Paris
destinations.description: A major European destination with a large Muslim population and abundant halal dining options.

destinations.name: Berlin
destinations.description: A diverse capital city with a well-established Muslim community and thriving halal food scene.

destinations.name: Rotterdam
destinations.description: A modern port city with a sizable Muslim community and growing halal-friendly offerings.

destinations.name: New York City
destinations.description: A global city with one of the largest halal food scenes outside the Muslim world.

destinations.name: Toronto
destinations.description: A multicultural city with strong halal certification standards and a large Muslim community.

destinations.name: Buenos Aires
destinations.description: An emerging destination for halal travel, home to Latin America's largest mosque.

destinations.name: Sydney
destinations.description: A coastal city with an established Muslim community and a wide variety of halal dining options.

destinations.name: Melbourne
destinations.description: Known for its diverse food culture, Melbourne offers an extensive range of halal eateries and mosques.

destinations.name: Hyderabad
destinations.description: A city steeped in Islamic history, famous for its biryani and Nizam-era architecture.

destinations.name: Lahore
destinations.description: A cultural capital rich in Mughal-era mosques, forts, and a renowned street food scene.

destinations.name: Dhaka
destinations.description: A bustling capital with countless mosques and a deeply rooted halal food culture.
